title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did it do something to you up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Annitiate DAY'S LINEAGE WITH THEY OWN HAND!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Snuff out all obstacles on God Valley!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is it me or are you bigger?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their blood must be purged from the pages of history!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn you, rocks! Aren't we meant to be allies?!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
